nasb.text: Meshelemiah had sons: Zechariah the firstborn, Jediael the second, Zebadiah the third, Jathniel the fourth,

esv.text: And Meshelemiah had sons: Zechariah the firstborn, Jediael the second, Zebadiah the third, Jathniel the fourth,

cnv.text: 米施利米雅有幾個兒子：長子是撒迦利雅、次子是耶疊、三子是西巴弟雅、四子是耶提聶、

ccb.text: 米施利米雅的长子是撒迦利亚，次子是耶叠，三子是西巴第雅，四子是耶提聂，
